title: Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
summary: Google Cloud presented Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) as standardized integration methods for building agents that connect to multiple data sources including BigQuery, Google Maps, and AlloyDB. The session also covered agent operations (AgentOps) for monitoring agent performance and costs with minimal implementation overhead.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session presents the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) as standardized methods for building agents that connect to multiple data sources, including BigQuery, Google Maps, and AlloyDB. It also covers AgentOps, the practice of monitoring agent performance and costs with minimal implementation overhead. The takeaways: ADK and MCP provide consistent integration patterns across data sources, and operational monitoring of agents can be added without heavy setup.
